brand_identity.name: Lumina Medical Center
brand_identity.mission: To provide world-class medical care with a human touch, leveraging advanced technology for better health outcomes.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero headings, and card titles. Letter-spacing: -0.02em.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, inputs, and UI elements. Relaxed line-height (1.6).

mono.usage: Use for medical record numbers, dates, and technical data in the dashboard.

primary.description: Deep Sky Blue. Represents cleanliness, trust, and professional medical care.

secondary.description: Emerald Green. Represents life, healing, and success.

accent.description: Rose. Use sparingly for 'Emergency', 'Urgent', or 'Delete' actions.

containers.card_style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-accent-main text-white hover:bg-accent-hover rounded-md px-4 py-2 shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
cards.doctor_profile: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow border border-slate-100
cards.stat: bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-slate-100 flex flex-col items-center justify-center

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all p-3

icons.usage: Use 'Duotone' weight for a premium, medical feel. Primary color for the main path, lighter opacity for the secondary path.

images.description: Modern glass hospital building exterior, clean and welcoming.
Contemporary medical center facade, good for 'About Us' or 'Locations'.
Male doctor, senior/experienced look (Chief Medical Officer).
Female specialist in white coat, professional and approachable.
Young male doctor, good for directory listing.
Clean, modern waiting area with chairs. Represents comfort.

placeholders.logo: Use a simple typographic logo with a medical cross icon (Phosphor: FirstAid).
placeholders.map: Use Google Maps Embed iframe (grayscale styled).

implementation_checklist: Install dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, date-fns, react-day-picker, recharts, sonner, clsx, tailwind-merge
Configure Tailwind: Add 'Outfit' font family, define custom colors (primary/secondary), set up container queries if needed.
Create Layouts: MainLayout (Navbar+Footer), DashboardLayout (Sidebar+Header), AuthLayout (Centered Box).
Build Base Components: Button (custom), Card, Input, Modal, Drawer (for mobile nav).
Develop Pages: Home (Hero -> Features -> Doctors -> CTA), Departments (Grid), Portal (Dashboard), Appointment (Form Wizard).

checklist: Ensure text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 (use slate-600+ on white).
All images must have alt text.
Interactive elements must have focus rings (focus:ring-2).
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, nav, aside).

dos: Use subtle borders (slate-100) instead of heavy shadows.
donts: Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0f172a).
Do NOT use generic 'Bootstrap' column layouts. Use asymmetric grids.
Do NOT clutter the interface. Less is more in healthcare.
Do NOT use default browser alerts. Use custom Dialogs or Toasts.
